owners.name: Owner 1
owners.description: Self-proclaimed expert on lower-league Cypriot football. Will not stop talking about it.

owners.name: Owner 2
owners.description: Drew the favourites and refuses to be humble about it.

owners.name: Owner 3
owners.description: Picked teams entirely based on the colour of their kits.

owners.name: Owner 4
owners.description: Quiet during the group stage, terrifying in the knockouts.

owners.name: Owner 5
owners.description: Has not watched a football match since 2018.
